mapper.select: SELECT record_id, user_id, record_date, period_id, meal_answers, medication_answers, activity_answers, emotion_answers, special_answers FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date= #{recordDate}
SELECT record_id, user_id, record_date, period_id, meal_answers, medication_answers, activity_answers, emotion_answers, special_answers FROM record WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO record (user_id, record_date, period_id, meal_answers, medication_answers, activity_answers, emotion_answers, special_answers, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{periodId}, #{mealAnswers} ::jsonb, #{medicationAnswers} ::jsonb, #{activityAnswers} ::jsonb, #{emotionAnswers} ::jsonb, #{specialAnswers} ::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE record SET period_id = #{periodId}, meal_answers = #{mealAnswers} ::jsonb, medication_answers = #{medicationAnswers} ::jsonb, activity_answers = #{activityAnswers} ::jsonb, emotion_answers = #{emotionAnswers} ::jsonb, special_answers = #{specialAnswers} ::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{id}
